sections.paragraph:
Original: את

Transliteration: 'êth

Phonetic: ayth

BDB Definition:

  1. with, near, together with
    1. with, together with
    2. with (of relationship)
    3. near (of place)
    4. with (poss.)
    5. from...with, from (with other preposition)

Origin: probably from H579

TWOT entry: 187

Part(s) of speech: Preposition
